# Founder mechanism post

## When to use

Use when category is immature.

## Why it works

Builds belief in mechanism and worldview.

## Mechanism

People inspect the thinking behind the product.

## Required inputs

POV post, demo clip, technical breakdown.

## When not to use

If founder lacks credible insight.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

Engagement quality, saves, profile visits, retargeting pool.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
